brand.tagline.en: Quiet your mind, focus on your question, then cast.
brand.tagline.zh-Hans: 静心凝神，专注于您的问题，然后开始起卦。

casting.questionPlaceholder.en: What would you like to ask?

casting.disclaimer.en: For cultural entertainment only. Not scientific prediction. Do not use for medical, legal, or financial decisions.
casting.disclaimer.zh-Hans: 仅供文化娱乐，非科学预测。请勿用于医疗、法律或财务决策。

casting.hint.coins.en: Shake your phone or tap the button — three coins settle six times, building the hexagram from bottom to top.
casting.hint.coins.zh-Hans: 摇动手机或点击按钮 — 三枚铜钱抛掷六次，从下往上逐爻排定。

casting.hint.number.en: Plum Blossom method: take innate trigram from the upper and lower numbers; their sum determines the moving line.
casting.hint.number.zh-Hans: 梅花易数：取上数字为外卦，下数字为内卦，两数之和定动爻。

casting.hint.time.en: Plum Blossom time method: cast using the selected date's ganzhi and solar date.
casting.hint.time.zh-Hans: 梅花易数时卦：按所选日期的干支及阳历日数起卦。

casting.hint.random.en: The system simulates a coin toss randomly for a quick experience.
casting.hint.random.zh-Hans: 系统随机模拟铜钱起卦，快速体验。

board.interpretationDesc.en: Submit this hexagram to a veteran Liuyao diviner for a detailed reading with multi-turn follow-up. The chart is fixed — the reading does not alter it.
board.interpretationDesc.zh-Hans: 将此卦呈递资深六爻师傅进行详细解读，支持多轮追问。盘面不变 — 解读不会改动卦象。

board.disclaimer.en: For cultural entertainment only. Not scientific prediction.
board.disclaimer.zh-Hans: 仅供文化娱乐，非科学预测。

board.legend.en: ○ Old Yang (moving)   × Old Yin (moving)   Self/Other mark the subject   Void marks the empty branch   Flourishing/Waning/Ideal/Confined/Dead indicates monthly strength
board.legend.zh-Hans: ○ 老阳（动爻）  × 老阴（动爻）  世/应标注主客  旬空标注空亡地支  旺/衰/相/囚/死表示月建旺衰

board.useGodHidden.en: Use God not found in primary hexagram (hidden line; seek elsewhere). Use as a reading hint.
board.useGodHidden.zh-Hans: 本卦中未找到用神（伏藏；宜另寻）。请作为解读参考。

ritual.preparePrompt.en: Quiet your mind and focus on your question
ritual.preparePrompt.zh-Hans: 静心凝神，专注于您的问题

ritual.shakePrompt.en: Shake your phone, or tap the button below to cast
ritual.shakePrompt.zh-Hans: 摇动手机，或点击下方按钮起卦

ritual.tapPrompt.en: Tap the button below to cast

settings.reduceMotionNotice.en: Reduce Motion is enabled. Animation will be downgraded.
settings.reduceMotionNotice.zh-Hans: 系统「减弱动态效果」已开启，动画已降级。

settings.note.en: Animation is purely performative — the hexagram is always deterministically computed by the local engine.
settings.note.zh-Hans: 动画为表演性质 — 卦象始终由本地引擎确定性计算。

interpret.scriptureDisclaimer.en: Scripture is for reference only. The reading is based on the hexagram's Self/Other and Use God.
interpret.scriptureDisclaimer.zh-Hans: 经文仅供参考。断卦以盘面世应/用神为准。

history.emptyDesc.en: Each cast is recorded here automatically. You can bookmark, review, and continue asking.
history.emptyDesc.zh-Hans: 每次起卦会自动记录在此。您可以收藏、回顾与继续询问。

history.corruptBoard.en: Hexagram data is corrupted and cannot be displayed.
history.corruptBoard.zh-Hans: 卦象数据损坏，无法显示。

error.calendarOutOfRange.en: Date is outside the supported range (1900–2100).

location.hint.en: True solar time shifts the divination hour to your local sun position by longitude. Optional — leave off to use your device's local time.
location.hint.zh-Hans: 真太阳时按经度将起卦时辰校正为当地太阳位置。可选 — 留空则使用设备本地时间。

encyclopedia.missingData.en: Encyclopedia data missing. Please check bundled resources.
encyclopedia.missingData.zh-Hans: 百科数据缺失，请检查随包资源。

encyclopedia.disclaimer.en: Scripture from the public domain Zhouyi, for reference only.
encyclopedia.disclaimer.zh-Hans: 经文为公有领域《周易》原文，仅供查阅参考。
